headline: A Look At Hormel Foods (HRL) Valuation After Its New AI Supply Chain Rollout
summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) has rolled out an AI powered demand and supply planning platform across its global network, in a move aimed at tightening execution in one of the food industry’s more complex supply chains. See our latest analysis for Hormel Foods. The AI rollout lands after a mixed stretch for investors, with the share price at US$23.02 and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 22.23% decline, alongside a 36.33% decline over three years and a 43.78% decline over five years.
